---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r}
################################################################################
##  prettier_3d_cnet.R ÔÇô interactive 3-D cnet plots with sensible aesthetics  ##
################################################################################

## 0. Packages ----
cran_pkgs <- c("threejs", "igraph", "htmlwidgets", "RColorBrewer", "scales")
bio_pkgs  <- c("clusterProfiler")        # just for the enrichResult classes
for (p in c(cran_pkgs, bio_pkgs))
  if (!requireNamespace(p, quietly = TRUE))
    if (p %in% cran_pkgs) install.packages(p) else BiocManager::install(p)

library(threejs)
library(igraph)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(scales)

## 1. Load saved enrichment bundle ----
obj    <- readRDS("output/enrichment_objects.rds")
ego    <- obj$ego
ekegg  <- obj$ekegg
ereact <- obj$ereact
fc_vec <- obj$fc_vec      # named numeric, ENTREZ Ôćĺ log2FC (can be empty)

## 2. Helper: build + save an improved 3-D plot ----
make_pretty_cnet <- function(enrich_res,
                             fc         = NULL,
                             showCat    = 15,
                             out_html   = "cnet3d.html",
                             seed       = 1L) {

  if (is.null(enrich_res) || nrow(as.data.frame(enrich_res)) == 0) {
    message("ÔÇó Skipped empty enrichment result.")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  ## 2a. Trim to top N terms (adj-P) ----
  res_df <- as.data.frame(enrich_res)[order(enrich_res@result$p.adjust), ]
  res_df <- head(res_df, showCat)
  term_nodes <- res_df$Description

  ## 2b. Edge list term Ôćö gene ----
  edge_df <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(res_df)), function(i) {
    genes <- strsplit(res_df$geneID[i], "/")[[1]]
    data.frame(from = res_df$Description[i], to = genes, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  }) |> do.call(rbind)

  ## 2c. igraph object & 3-D layout ----
  g <- graph_from_data_frame(edge_df, directed = FALSE)
  set.seed(seed)
  coords <- layout_with_drl(g, options = list(dimension = 3))

  ## 2d. Vertex attributes ----
  V(g)$type   <- ifelse(V(g)$name %in% term_nodes, "term", "gene")

  # Colour palette for genes: blue (down) Ôćĺ white Ôćĺ red (up)
  pal <- colorRampPalette(rev(brewer.pal(11, "RdBu")))(100)

  gene_fc <- fc[V(g)$name]
  gene_col <- pal[findInterval(rescale(gene_fc, to = c(1, 100),
                                       from = range(gene_fc, na.rm = TRUE)),
                               1:100)]
  gene_col[is.na(gene_col)] <- "#B3B3B3"

  V(g)$color <- ifelse(V(g)$type == "term", "#E5C494", gene_col)

  ## Size: term by gene count; gene by |logFC|
  V(g)$size <- ifelse(
    V(g)$type == "term",
    rescale(res_df$Count[match(V(g)$name, term_nodes)], to = c(10, 24)),
    rescale(abs(gene_fc),                       to = c(4, 12))
  )
  V(g)$size[is.na(V(g)$size)] <- 4  # genes lacking FC

  ## Labels & tooltips ----
  V(g)$label <- ifelse(V(g)$type == "term", V(g)$name, "")
  V(g)$tooltip <- ifelse(
    V(g)$type == "term",
    paste0(V(g)$name, "\nGenes: ", res_df$Count[match(V(g)$name, term_nodes)]),
    paste0(V(g)$name,
           ifelse(!is.na(gene_fc[V(g)$name]),
                  sprintf("\nlog2FC: %.2f", gene_fc[V(g)$name]),
                  ""))
  )

  ## 2e. Render ----
  widget <- graphjs(
    g,
    layout        = coords,
    vertex.size   = V(g)$size,
    vertex.color  = V(g)$color,
    vertex.label  = V(g)$label,
    vertex.tooltip = V(g)$tooltip,
    edge.width    = 0.3,
    edge.color    = "#AAAAAA",
    bg            = "white"
  )

  dir.create(dirname(out_html), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  saveWidget(widget, out_html, selfcontained = TRUE)
  message("Ôťô Saved interactive 3-D cnet Ôćĺ ", out_html)
}

## 3. Generate plots ----
dir.create("output/3d_cnet_pretty", showWarnings = FALSE)

make_pretty_cnet(ego,    fc_vec, showCat = 15,
                 out_html = "output/3d_cnet_pretty/cnet3d_GO_ORA.html")
make_pretty_cnet(ekegg,  fc_vec, showCat = 15,
                 out_html = "output/3d_cnet_pretty/cnet3d_KEGG_ORA.html")
make_pretty_cnet(ereact, fc_vec, showCat = 15,
                 out_html = "output/3d_cnet_pretty/cnet3d_Reactome_ORA.html")

message("\nOpen the HTML files and explore:\n",
        " ÔÇó drag = rotate ÔÇó scroll = zoom ÔÇó hover = tooltip")

```
